---
title: "Commentary & Policy Writing"
---

"[Scotland's new bonds will put a price tag on independence](https://www.gla.ac.uk/research/az/publicpolicy/news/headline_1243704_en.html)" with Ben Cormier. *[University of Glasgow Centre for Public Policy](https://www.gla.ac.uk/research/az/publicpolicy/)*, 3 February 2026.

"[Donald Trump's peace agreements are also business deals](https://theconversation.com/donald-trumps-peace-agreements-are-also-business-deals-271539)" *The Conversation*, 10 December 2025.

"[US presidents have always used transactional foreign policy – but Trump does it differently](https://theconversation.com/us-presidents-have-always-used-transactional-foreign-policy-but-trump-does-it-differently-262920)" *The Conversation*, 13 August 2025.

"[Why Russia is not taking Trump's threats seriously](https://theconversation.com/why-russia-is-not-taking-trumps-threats-seriously-261296)" *The Conversation*, 16 July 2025.

"[War Finance in the 21st Century: Insights from Ukraine, Syria, and Beyond](https://ucigcc.org/blog/war-finance-in-the-21st-century-insights-from-ukraine-syria-and-beyond/)" with Rosella Capella Zielinski. *Institute on Global Conflict and Cooperation*, March 2025.

"[Why a US minerals deal with Ukraine won't deter Russian aggression](https://theconversation.com/why-a-us-minerals-deal-with-ukraine-wont-deter-russian-aggression-251436)" *The Conversation*, 7 March 2025.

"[What happens next in Ukraine's debt negotiations could change the course of the war](https://theconversation.com/what-happens-next-in-ukraines-debt-negotiations-could-change-the-course-of-the-war-233355)" *The Conversation*, 1 July 2024.

"[The whole world is facing a debt crisis – but richer countries can afford to stop it](https://theconversation.com/the-whole-world-is-facing-a-debt-crisis-but-richer-countries-can-afford-to-stop-it-192119)" *The Conversation*, 26 October 2022.

## Evidence to Parliament

"[FCDO's Approach to Higher Education and Research Partnerships](https://committees.parliament.uk/writtenevidence/165444/html/)" Written evidence submitted to the International Development Committee. With Maha Rafi Atal, Matt Barlow, Allan Gillies, Benjamin Hunter, and Bernhard Reinsberg. 2026.

"[Future of UK Aid and Development Assistance](https://committees.parliament.uk/writtenevidence/152271/html/)" Written evidence submitted to the International Development Committee. With Maha Rafi Atal, Benjamin Hunter, and Bernhard Reinsberg. October 2025.

## Media

I provide commentary on sovereign debt, war finance, critical minerals, and international economic power. For media enquiries, please [get in touch](mailto:patrick.shea@glasgow.ac.uk).
